motion: PR #101 "chore: T3 — BridgeManager (Godot side)" should be merged into feature/86-feature-phase-1-skeleton-tower

fixes.description: SSE agent.registered schema mismatch — Go sends "agent_id" but Godot reads "id". Expand SSEAgentRegistered to carry full AgentJSON fields with json:"id" tag
Cursor never propagated to client — embed se.ID as "cursor" field in all SSE event payloads so Godot _last_cursor updates and ?since= resumption works

pr_amendments: Update bridgemanager-godot-side-spec.md API Contracts table to document cursor field in SSE event payloads
Update SSEAgentRegistered doc comment to reflect it now carries full agent state
